case_title: ESTHER LERNER VS. JOSHUA BRADSHAW ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LERNER, ESTHER AS TO DEFENDANT BRADSHAW, JOSHUA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-14-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-13-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-21-2020
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-14-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-16-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-02-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-16-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-02-2021 CONTINUED TO MAY-04-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-04-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
